$comment: Template for .codex/hooks.json emitted to Codex-aware USE templates. IMPORTANT: Codex hooks fire on Bash tool invocations only. apply_patch, Write, and MCP tool calls do NOT fire PreToolUse/PostToolUse events — those are enforced via .claude/codex-mcp-guard/server.js. See .claude/agents/codex-architect.md § Hooks Coverage for details.
$env_var_note: Codex does NOT export $CODEX_PROJECT_DIR (verified 2026-04-23 against developers.openai.com/codex/config-advanced). Hook commands use relative paths (./.claude/hooks/...) which rely on Codex invoking the hook with cwd=project_root. Hook scripts themselves parse JSON stdin and extract `cwd` for internal path resolution, so process-cwd drift is tolerated if Codex later changes behavior. See .claude/agents/codex-architect.md § Hook Path Resolution.
